title: Citrus Zaatar Naan
description: A flavorful Indian flatbread infused with citrus zest and zaatar, perfect for a quick snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, and salt.
Gradually add water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise for 1 hour.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or tava over medium heat.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal portions and roll out into thin circles.
Brush the naan with olive oil and sprinkle with zaatar and lemon zest.
Cook for 1-2 minutes on each side, until golden brown and puffed.
Serve hot with or without cottage cheese, if desired.
